Role – general role and main responsibilities
Phone calls from the public – complaint line, or generalized question line, scan documents – rent holds/rentl releases, t&d, n&m ticjkets
Letters folding
Help at the window, people who in come person
Jordan: Help pick up projects
Day to day – writing tickets, send
Ownership verification
Rental Registry maintenance
Shawna: Take complaints, schedule inspections – get a lot of the werid calls, lots of fact finding
Mastajah does most of the nail and mails, Shawna does the phones
Data entry – stuff from Law, stuff from tickets
Process
M: People who call, can also be person who come in person
Inspectors go to first
Most calls – inspector to go out for a complaint
Lots of people want to talk to supervisor
Ask each other questions
Tools: IPS, Camino, catchment map, Outlook, phones
Collaboration tools – all set near each other, most
J: Sends a lot of emails, mostly to inspectors, then BAA tickets
Doesn’t use the phone very much
Day-to-day collab with BAA and internal CE
Email with Permits sometimes not often
Tools: Outlook, IPS, maps, use County Clerk database, uses AS400 for Rental Registry for water billing
S: Does the most – takes phone calls, complaints, schedule inspections
Inspector involved at some point
Speaks with Tom or Bill if there’s an issue – if someone is out, needs another inspector
Tools: IPS, Outlook, GIS, catchment map, Teams, AS400
Rent Holds and Rent Releases – get in contact with NBD – 3 receives them and someone from DSS (Lisbeth Nobel)
Pain points and challenges
M: Unhandled exception error – entered complaint case and crashes
IPS crash 2-3 times per day
S: Scheduling
When person supposed to be in a certain error
Not all explciitly told at the same time who is doing what e.. Pat C. commercial electrical and building insp supposed to be doing what Pat was doing, but no one aware
Periodic Insp module for Rental Registry – annoying, unorganized
Inspector names not alphabetized
Scheduling appoiintment – that is alphabetized
Inspection schedule and inspection note
Only use 2 out of the 20 options – actions in the drop-down in the periodics module
Default options in complaint module always pre-populated – would be helpful for it to autofill
Each appointment – have to schedule in 2-3 places (Outlooks, Periodics module) - if all calendars could be auto-filled that would be helpful
CofU or CofI – would be nice if all inspectors could collaborate on it, rather than setting up individually
Bldg, Fire, Electrical – schedule each individually
Our phones are on a time limit – 5min max – drops automatically – IT has known about this issue – people call back and yell because they think they hung up
4-5 properties scheduling inspections for – call will drop bc time consuming to schedule each one
20 calls dropped between 4 of them one week
20min wasted time due to phones
J: IPS crashing
Loud sighs
BAA ticketing – processes seem inconsist and stupid – BAA would send back a ticket with a minor correction i.e. period off or missing letter ‘t’ Scott
Find ticket – make a single character edit
They could edit it on their end
Problem bc inspector should sign, then inspector could edit it – delay by days
BAA inconsistent – send back tickets for taking out a care/of line or making it a second line or saying Image Mate has 2 people listed but  – but only cited one person
Address for owner legit address – deed search and on Image Mate, who we sent violation notice to
BAA tried to send to PO Box – didn't go through – couldn't serve it twice, denied ticket and sent it back
His work around – said Law verify address

S: Limit on tabs IPS can handle- multi-task – may have 7 tabs open, upload documents, tabs open – when that error comes up – is there a limit to tabs before crashes? On average ~10 complaint cases open
Managing multiple tools – is that frustrating? Could be a more efficient way to have all the things they use. Shawn: very analog so doesn’t know what that would look like GIS map
Deed search – if inspectors listed with parcel info
Would save time if all info on catchment map were in IPS on the parcel – but still wouldn’t have geographic context
M: Pixel perfect when searching by address in AS400 – very difficult, functionality atrocious, like the aesthetic
J: AS400 – uses it for water billing, goes to view wtr history and won’t go anywhere – will go ‘long way’ - additional 3 steps – even then sometimes it’s not there
Only more annoying because
Kevin gave long list of address changes – updating owner addresses in AS400 and in IPS
Updating address only annoying
Death certificate 2003 of someone trying to serve
Can they have assessment update the address?
IPS doesn’t allow saving owner addresses sometimes – or permission based? Tim could do it
Sheer amount of duplicates in address book in IPS and AS400 – some of that is the owner addresses themselves
With LLCs do have to keep it distinct if multiple LLCs so not all within our control
Put in contact information – enter someone with same name, address book won’t let you enter it if it’s similar – e.g. enter same name but different address
Assessment change of address form – share
Anything you like about IPS
Automatically adds hypens with phone number
Appreciates that within parcel, can click on button that brings directly to Image Mate with the owner address
Dark mode for IPS?  +2 Incredibly bright
Other information you wish were available or features/capabailities?
Spell check or grammar check
Not consistent – some parts have features and others don’t

If everything could be more easily identifiable on the thumbnails – when you pull ip the Parcel History, not easy to tell e..g large complexes like Nob Hill, has to open each individually to find apartment – make it more identifiable e.g. apartment, unit – only has status, open date
Finding/opening specific cases difficult
Computer is slow – takes 45 sec to open complaint case
When you open a case note on an already open case – sometimes your name isn’t there – blank space – sometimes only inspectors are there
Some things you need to hit Save and other time you don’t need to
Save button never in the same place or
New next to Save and look the same
Notepads, a lot of Excel documents
S: Doesn’t use Excel on day to day
Made cheat sheets and phone lists of commonly ysed things – reference docs
Deed search, GIS,
MS Teams: will contact cityline Christine Norween
Inspectors update SeeClick Fix – not admin aides
Mondays are the busiest – 9 or 3pm
